[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 101100111 6
2 000001011 3
3 100100000 2
4 100001011 4
5 101010011 5
6 100111010 5
7 000000101 2

23 32 000000000 a

67 76 000100000 1
70 07 000100100 2
